# CleanMax Laundry

CleanMax Laundry is a full-service laundromat in Pomona, California, serving the Pomona Valley and Inland Empire. We offer self-service laundry, walk-in wash & fold drop-off, commercial laundry pickup and delivery, and specialty services for comforters and large loads.

- Address: 1009 E Holt Ave, Pomona, CA 91767
- Phone: (909) 248-7305
- Email: laundry@cleanmaxlaundry.com
- Hours: 6 AM – 10 PM, seven days a week (last wash 9 PM)
- Payment: Coin or AirWallet cashless app (loads via credit/debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal)

## Services

- **Self-service laundry**: Modern Wascomat washers and dryers, open daily 6 AM to 10 PM. 25 washers (25–80 lb capacity) and 34 dryers. Bilingual attendant on site every open hour.
- **Wash & fold**: $1.50/lb with a $25 order minimum. Same-day turnaround on drop-offs before 3 PM; next-day otherwise. Also known regionally as "fluff and fold."
- **Commercial pickup & delivery**: Scheduled commercial-only pickup and delivery throughout the Pomona Valley and Inland Empire. $65 flat pickup fee; next-day delivery standard on orders under 750 lbs. Pickup is not offered for residential customers — residential wash & fold is walk-in drop-off only.
- **Commercial laundry**: Weekly, biweekly, and on-call service for eight verticals with distinct handling: Gyms & Fitness Studios (member towels, workout gear), Restaurants & Catering (tablecloths, napkins, chef uniforms, kitchen towels), Airbnb & Vacation Rentals (bed linens, towels, blankets), Hotels & Hospitality (sheets, towels, robes, guest linens), Salons & Spas (towels, capes, robes), Medical & Dental Offices (scrubs, lab coats, clinical linens — no biohazards), Schools & Daycares (uniforms, bibs, activity towels), and Auto Shops & Dealerships (shop rags, mechanic uniforms, floor mats — standard grease accepted).
- **Comforters & large loads**: Large-capacity machines for bedding, duvets, and oversized items.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com
- Locations served: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/locations
- Wash & fold pricing: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/wash-and-fold/pricing
- Commercial laundry & pickup/delivery: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/commercial-laundry
- Commercial quote request: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/commercial-quote
- Comforters & large loads: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/comforters-large-loads
- Blog: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/blog
- Spanish site: https://www.cleanmaxlaundry.com/es

## Service area

Pomona, Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Chino, Chino Hills, Upland, Claremont, Diamond Bar, West Covina, Covina, Glendora, La Verne, San Dimas, Azusa, Walnut, Corona, Jurupa Valley, Montclair. Pickup & delivery additionally serves Fontana, Rialto, Colton, and Riverside.

## Languages

Content is available in English and Spanish. Spanish pages are mirrored under the /es/ path prefix.
